Real Madrid vs Athletic Bilbao, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid take on Athletic Bilbao just a few days after the embarrassing loss at home against Arsenal in the return leg of the Champions League Quarterfinals. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Valverde, Asencio, Rudiger, Fran Garcia, Ceballos, Camavinga, Bellingham, Vinicius, Brahim, Endrick.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'suffer major transfer blow' as top forward target Nico Williams drops hint over his future
arts.sum: Athletic Bilbao attacker Nico Williams - linked with Arsenal and Barcelona - suggests that he wants to spend at least one more season at San Mames.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer target Nico Williams clears his future with Champions League ambition
arts.sum: Arsenal’s chances of signing Athletic Bilbao winger Nico Williams have been dealt a major blow. The Spaniard, who was part of Spain’s Euro 2024 winning team last year, has caught the attention of Arsenal and some other big clubs with his consistent performances for his club and country. arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano announces Dean Huijsen transfer amid Arsenal, Chelsea, Liverpool and Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Real Madrid have been heavily linked with Huijsen, and it appears to be his dream move, but Los Blancos have yet to decide whether they will actually look to add a centre-back this summer, which has given Premier League clubs an advantage. Fabrizio Romano has confirmed that Dean Huijsen will likely stay in the Premier League this summer.
